feature.name: HTML-in-canvas
feature.creator: aaronhk@chromium.org
feature.summary: HTML-in-canvas enables customizing the rendering of html using canvas with three new primitives: an attribute to opt-in canvas elements (layoutsubtree), methods to draw child elements (2d: drawElementImage, webgl: texElementImage2D, webgpu: copyElementImageToTexture), and a paint event which fires to handle updates.

intake.finding: ChromeStatus record (created 2024-06-26 by aaronhk@chromium.org). HTML-in-canvas enables customizing the rendering of html using canvas with three new primitives: an attribute to opt-in canvas elements (layoutsubtree), methods to draw child elements (2d: drawElementImage, webgl: texElementImage2D, webgpu: copyElementImageToTexture), and a paint event which fires to handle updates. Category: Graphics. Blink component: Blink>Canvas. Stars: 79.
intake.limitations: ChromeStatus record fields only; intent thread content not directly accessible.
